Package io.github.imetaxas.realitycheck.yaml

Class YamlCheck

java.lang.Object
io.github.imetaxas.realitycheck.AbstractCheck<YamlCheck,String>
io.github.imetaxas.realitycheck.yaml.YamlCheck
All Implemented Interfaces:
Check<YamlCheck,String>
public final class YamlCheck extends AbstractCheck<YamlCheck,String>
Fluent assertions for YAML strings with dot-path queries. 

 import static io.github.imetaxas.realitycheck.yaml.YamlReality.*;

 checkThatYaml(config).isValidYaml().pathEquals("server.port", 8080);
